entries.name: Grappler

rawImport.name: Grappler
desc: You芒聙聶ve developed the Skills necessary to hold your own in close--quarters Grappling. You gain the following benefits:
- You have advantage on Attack Rolls against a creature you are Grappling.
- You can use your action to try to pin a creature Grappled by you. To do so, make another grapple check. If you succeed, you and the creature are both Restrained until the grapple ends.

entries.description:
You芒聙聶ve developed the Skills necessary to hold your own in close--quarters Grappling. You gain the following benefits:

- You have advantage on Attack Rolls against a creature you are Grappling.

- You can use your action to try to pin a creature Grappled by you. To do so, make another grapple check. If you succeed, you and the creature are both Restrained until the grapple ends.

entries.name: Actor Feat
entries.description: +1 CHA. Supports mimicry, false identities, and impersonation flavor without adding another flat bonus to player-facing deception.

entries.name: Skill Expert
entries.description: +1 CHA. Folded into Expert Deceiver for prepared deception/impersonation/persuasion.

entries.name: Beguiling Influence
entries.description: Folded into Expert Deceiver. Grants proficiency in Deception and Persuasion.

entries.name: Silver Tongue
entries.description: For Deception/Persuasion outside player-facing checks, d20 rolls of 9 or lower count as 10.
